title: Homespun
description: A mod that adds blocks and items with a homespun feel to them.
body:
# Homespun
Homespun is a smallish mod that aims to add features that have a simple and home made feeling to them, inspired by pre industrial things around the world. Currently it focuses on agriculture and decoration but in the future it may branch out.

![all the blocks and items as of 0.5.0](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iBp3HlFE/images/2cb8f8c8948894f87402baa9d7bfcd10db30a787.png)

## The features
### These are an overveiw of the features currently in the mod, more are sure to come!
 - Ironwood! a decorative tree type with a rough peachy tone, and may have sneaky usage for the engineers out there ;). It can be found in plains, swamp, forest, and jungle biomes.
 - Olive! a decorative tree type with a orange hue reminiscent of a mediterranean sunset. It can be found in plains and savannas.
 - Olive and ironwood mosaics. To line up with the bamboo mosaics added in 1.20 and to give you more variation in your plains of planks.
 - Gold and Copper decorative blocks, such as chains, to add regal and mechanical options to your metalic decorating.
 - Copper nuggets, to help in crafting of blocks.
 - Calcite bricks and Tuff tiles! finally, calcite and tuff have decorative blocks! that also come in the form of slabs, stairs, and walls.
 - Stone pillars. finally! you can support your buildings with something other than logs.
 - Crushing tub. Put stuff in and jump on it! get lots of excersize and some funky resources with this block.
 - Evaporating Basin. Dries fluids into items! 
 - Iron and Wood Posts. thin posts that gain a lip when a non post block is placed above them, I think they look nice for lamp posts. Can be rotated in the direction of each axis
 - Redstone Acid. Can be used for weathering blocks like copper.
 - Wrought Tiles & Cut Wraught Tiles. These blocks can be made with iron and are designed to line up in colour with other decorative iron blocks. They come in the form of blocks, stairs, slabs, and walls.
 - A fancy item storage, Ceramic vessels! These pots come in 7 variants (1 blank and 6 pride themed patterns). They can store 12 stacks of items and can be broken and carried with items stored.
- A new revolutionary fluid storage block, the Rundlet! Using revolutionary ironwood technology these vessels can store any fluid in a stationary and portable form.


## Notes and thanks
Thank you to Eris for making [Rustic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rustic). A constant companion through many modpacks and an obvious inspiration for this mod.

If you encounter any bugs, have any suggestions, or want to talk with another fan of my mods, join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/VEqBsVaQFy)! alternatively, issues and suggestions can be reported [here](https://github.com/caittastic/Homespun/issues)

I can also be found discussing my mod on the Rustic Discord server [here](https://discord.com/invite/5HCrCr3)

[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/homespun) is the version of this mod hosted on Curseforge.

[Here](https://github.com/caittastic/Homespun) is the mod's github repository

This mod is proudly made by a member of the LGBT community. Trans rights are human rights🏳️‍⚧️
